entry.title: Re: How to compair all line item field values
entry.content: Not very clear what the question is. If you compare one item, and it's NOT equal, it means that all items are NOT equal.

entry.title: eDocument cockpit -> CPI -> ANAF response message error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We want to connect the eDocument to the Romanian tax authorities (ANAF) through the CPI middleware. Three calls are necessary for this, all this calls worked. In these calls, we receive the DownloadID, UploadID, and a ZIP file from ANAF in the third call.

We are unsure how to create the response for the eDocument. The edoccockpit does not return any errors:

So nothing is being processed and the transaction is still listed as "RED status" We are using this service consumer, and I suspect that the issue lies with the "EncodedZippedResponse" field.

The ZIP file contains two files. My question is:

Should I convert the whole ZIP file to Base64 and send it back to the eDocument? Or should I unpack it first and  send only parts of the ZIP file? Does anyone have experience with this topic?

Kind regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: Mask in CJ20N - "Screen" field
entry.content: Ok, so I entered the project number in the "Project def." field and hit enter yes. And after that the field "Screen" is not appearing. This might be a silly question, but is there any customizing where I link the project mask to the project profile or to he project type or project template? because I don't have that customization and maybe that's the reason why "screen" is not appearing? thanks!

entry.title: Re: Mass Export of Performance Forms in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Dren,

the classic Report function is deprecated in the Test System now. 😕 I read a few weeks ago, that the function will be somewhere else, but I can not find any information about it. If anybody has any information, I would really appreciate it, if you could share it. 🙂

BR Linda

entry.title: Re: Consolidation breakdown categories
entry.content: For the question, the FS item should have which BDA is totally depend on yourself. We have some predefined content and you can check the example. But if you want to add more FS item, yes, you need to decide which BDA should be used based on demand. We don't have guide on this action because it 's very customized.

entry.title: Re: Create CDS Entity in system 2 based on table in system 1

As mentioned by other we are looking at using Virtual tables, which is bit easier.

Regards,

Naga

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding

Regards,

Naga

entry.title: Fiori : Navigate from List to Detail Alternative
entry.content:
Hi Community members,

I have received a requirement from my customer where they would like to restrict/disable the click action for navigation to detail page anywhere in the row area and instead click on the chevron icon at the end of the row highlighted. Reason for such request could be because we also have an edit option where during the editing values, by mistake when the click happens, the detail page opens during editing.

Has anyone come across such requirement. Your response is appreciated. Thanks

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori @maheshpalavalli @GregMalewski

entry.title: Re: SAC SSO Dynamic User Creatinon
entry.content:
Hi!

You need to address to 2 help pages:

1. How to manage roles: Mapping Roles Using SAML Attributes

@Matthew_Shaw provided to you some additional links.

2. How to map roles to user groups while using Custom IdP

Here you can find point #7 with all the possible additional attributes. But you can't use email as an attribute because it's a key to map users

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - OData Integration – Customize CSRF Token Fetching URL
entry.content:
In this blog, I will discuss the recent enhancement in SAP Build Apps for CSRF token handling, specifically on how to customize where to fetch the CSRF token for OData integration. You may already know that there is an additional property in SAP BTP Destination dedicated to SAP Build Apps CSRF token handling:

 

BuildApps.RequiresCsrf = true

 

If your destination requires the CSRF token to be passed, this property needs to be set to true. To learn more about this, please check out the blog

Understand CSRF handling in SAP Build Apps.

Now, let's get back to the newly released enhancement. We have introduced a new property, 'CSRF Token,' in the General Settings section under the Data Configuration tab in the App Editor for OData integration with SAP systems. As shown in the screenshot below, you can configure where to fetch the CSRF token from your backend SAP system. By default, the 'CSRF Token' property is disabled

It will be enabled after you set the additional property BuildApps.RequiresCsrf = true in the BTP destination and re-open the App Editor, as shown in the screenshot below

 

You can now specify where to fetch the CSRF token from your backend OData service. Once you tick the checkbox 'Overwrite CSRF Token URL',  the default value in the 'CSRF Token URL' input box is a slash /, which means to fetch the CSRF token from the root folder of your backend OData service. For example, if your BTP destination ‘MyODataDest’ setting is as shown below

 

#

#Thu Sep 05 07:22:58 UTC 2024

Type=HTTP

BuildApps.RequiresCsrf=true

Name=MyODataDest

URL=https\://mycompany.com/OData/myodatasvc

ProxyType=Internet

AppgyverEnabled=true

 

SAP Build Apps runtime will use HTTP HEAD and GET requests to fetch a CSRF token from https://mycompany.com/OData/myodatasvc. This token is then used for subsequent HTTP POST, PUT, PATCH, or DELETE requests.

If the root folder of your backend OData service does not support HTTP HEAD and GET requests for fetching the CSRF token, you need to customize the default value '/' to a relative path that does. For example, you can set the CSRF token URL to '/path/svc1'.

In this case, the SAP Build Apps runtime, which means the deployed app to SAP Build Work Zone or the standalone mobile app running on iOS and Android, will fetch the CSRF token from https://mycompany.com/OData/myodatasvc/path/svc1 and use it for later HTTP POST, PUT, or DELETE requests against https://mycompany.com/OData/myodatasvc.

entry.title: Compare Dimension property Value, if it is blank/null - Data Action
entry.content:
I have a public dimension and i have a integer property in it,

i want to check if it is blank or null

the below doesn;t work in data action, i get error, different types cannot be compared with != operator, even if i use == operator it doesn't work


IF [d/P].[p/COST] != ""

 

@N1kh1l

Re: What are the parameters of Function Module
entry.content:
it seems that there is a typo in line 12, instead of 'formal OUTPUT parameters' 'formal INPUT parameters' is written.

according to the terminology the Export parameters must be the other way round of Import parameters.

entry.title: Guidance Required on Implementing Custom Chart of Accounts in SAP Cloud 2408
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I am currently implementing SAP Cloud 2408 for a client, and the client has shared their own customized Chart of Accounts (COA) instead of using the standard predefined COA. I would like your guidance on the best approach to proceed.

Should I:

  1. Create a custom COA and then build the GL accounts under that custom COA?
  2. Use the predefined COA and adjust the account numbers according to the client’s number range?

Additionally, the client’s customized COA contains more than 700 GL accounts. Could you please confirm if there is an upload tool available in SAP Cloud 2408 to efficiently upload these GL accounts? If yes, kindly provide guidance on how to use it.

Looking forward to your advice.

Regards,

Syed Ahsan Ali

entry.title: Re: Compare Dimension property Value, if it is blank/null - Data Action
entry.content: i cannot use >0 as in the dimension, if the cost is blank, it is stored as blank only

entry.title: Re: Tracable packaging
entry.content:
Note to self from reddit:

 

You need to define your packaging material as managed in inventory. I imagine that you are using the material type VERP, if yes then you just need to create plant data storage view for it. You can then enter it in inventory using MIGO 501 for example. To decrease the inventory automatically during outbound process you need to generate delivery line for your packaging material in the OBD. Here is a post that explain the steps : https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/automatic-creation-of-packaging-delivery-item-from-handling-unit-packaging/ba-p/13303914 Please note that there is a dedicated process for returnable packaging on which you can track who is the owner of the packaging material and if you send packaging material that you own to your customer to track the inventory at customer place.

entry.title: Re: Modify the posting in F-54 when making an advance pay...
entry.content: IF I remove ir it gives this error: AA834 - The asset cannot be posted with this movement type

entry.title: currency/unit conversion error: Conversion could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Datasphere experts,

I am facing the error "currency/unit conversion error: Conversion could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s)" while trying to create a calculated column in SAP Datasphere for unit conversion

T006 & T006D tables are present in my space (Z_TGT_UOM_DF & Z_TGT_DIMENSION_DF). I have created a data flow and loaded their content into the respective target tables.

If I use a hard coded value in the CONVERT_UNIT expression for SOURCE_UNIT e.g. "KG", it works fine. Please see bellow

Although, if I try to use a source field (ITEMGROSSWEIGHT) for the SOURCE_UNIT, which has exactly the same value as the previously hard coded one (KG) I get the error.

 

Please note that I have exactly one record for testing.

What could be the possible reason?

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Fetch data of customer and send to Open text system
entry.content: For which OpenText solution ?

entry.title: Re: ADSO fields getting empty post data activation
entry.content: Hello everyone! Sorry for the delay and many thanks for your inputs. Just to give you a brief to your questions/recommendations. I was using the same key fields in the aDSO as the Standard SAP CDS view used for extraction. Somehow I think the TRFN got corrupted due to the switch of the aDSO type. After I added 2 more fields (non key) and reactivated the aDSO/TRFN, the activation of the aDSO data worked fine. It might sound strange, but this was the solution to my issue

entry.title: I can not access the OData service from BAS.
entry.content:
Hi,

As you can see, the ui5 app appears empty. Have someone an idea to solve this issue?

View

<table:Table id="table" selectionMode="Single" rows="{myODataModel>/ZEMPLOYEEDATASet}" enableColumnReordering="false">
                            <!-- columns for customer name, address, and email -->
                            <table:columns>
                                <table:Column id="idColumn3" width="50%">
                                    <table:label>
                                        <Label id="idLabel3" text="ID"/>
                                    </table:label>
                                    <table:template>
                                        <Text id="idText3" text="{myODataModel>Id}"/>
                                    </table:template>
                                </table:Column>
                                <table:Column id="idColumn1" width="20%">
                                    <table:label>
                                        <Label id="idLabel1" text="Name"/>
                                    </table:label>
                                    <table:template>
                                        <Text id="idText1" text="{myODataModel>Name}"/>
                                    </table:template>
                                </table:Column>
                                <table:Column id="idColumn2" width="30%">
                                    <table:label>
                                        <Label id="idLabel2" text="Address"/>
                                    </table:label>
                                    <table:template>
                                        <Text id="idText2"  text="{myODataModel>Address}"/>
                                    </table:template>
                                </table:Column>
                                <table:Column id="idColumn4" width="50%">
                                    <table:label>
                                        <Label id="idLabel4" text="Phone Number"/>
                                    </table:label>
                                    <table:template>
                                        <Text id="idText4" text="{myODataModel>phonenumber}"/>
                                    </table:template>
                                </table:Column>
                            </table:columns>
                        </table:Table>

controller

onInit: function () {
    // Wait for the view to fully render
    this.getView().addEventDelegate({
        onAfterRendering: function () {
            // OData model instance
            var oModel = new sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataModel("/sap/opu/odata/SAP/Z_EMPLOYEE_SRV/");
            this.getView().setModel(oModel);
            
            // Get the table instance
            var oTable = this.getView().byId("table");
            
            if (oTable) {
                // Bind the rows of the table to the OData entity set
                oTable.bindRows({
                    path: "/ZEMPLOYEEDATASet",  // OData entity set
                    parameters: {
                        select: "Id,Name,Address,Phonenumber"  // Select fields
                    }
                });
            } else {
                console.error("Table not found");
            }
        }.bind(this)
    });
}

manifest file

"sap.app": {
    ............
    .......
    "dataSources": {
      "mainService": {
          "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/SAP/Z_EMPLOYEE_SRV/",
          "type": "OData"
          
      }  
    }
  },
"sap.ui5": {
  "models": {
   .....
      "myODataModel": {
                "type": "sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataModel",
                "dataSource": "mainService",
                "settings": {
                    "defaultBindingMode": "TwoWay",
                    "defaultCountMode": "Inline"
                }
            }
    },
}

 

 

Thank you 
Mahmood

entry.title: Cloud transport management: import all, forward all commands
entry.content:
Dear community,

is there a way to disable the "import all" and "forward all" commands, so to achieve the same peace of mind we have using the NO_IMPORT_ALL parameter in STMS?

I've experienced the thrilling sensation you get when you use the import all truck (it wasn't me but it was an adventure just the same). I don't want to find myself in the same situation twice in one life.

Thank you

Peter

entry.title: Re: Material demand migration for project
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Since it might be usefull for someone else, I got this answer from SAP itself:

"There is NO method in the SAP standard to mass upload Materials in to the project system 
(Mass upload could lead to many incorrect allocations) 

It may be possible to create your own program using BAPI_NETWORK_COMP_ADD "

I will close this thread, thank you

System is calculating gross weight wrong & randomly for the first batch split line item in outbound delivery in sap. This is for some of the cases only. Can any one explain why this scenario occurs. Please note we have WM integrated with SAP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Extensibility Wizard for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: @Karthik-Thiru Thank you for the update. I checked the S/4 Link aswell and in that help section it advises to use Oauth 2.0 for authentication but the BTP set up refers to SAMLAssertion. I believe the authentication type must be the same.

entry.title: Re: Compare Dimension property Value, if it is blank/null...
entry.content:
@NotASAPUser 

The error is correct that you cannot use = to compare two different data types. Here it is Integer on left and "" is string type.

Another way of testing your condition ( Project Cost attribute is blank) is as below

IF [d/PROJECT].[p/ORI_PRJ_COST] +1=1 THEN //adding 1+ blank will be 1

// your code here

ENDIF

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: GUI ENQUE FM removed locks when GUI is closed
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using GUI screens to lock a record of particular table and ENQUE FM locks it successfully with type 'E' and Scope - 1. When user moves to next screen or closes screen, locks are removed. 

I tried with scope = 2 and 3 as well but no success. 

My requirement is to use retain locks till DEQUE FM is triggered explicitly. Cam someone help me how to achieve this.

Thanks !!

entry.content:
Dear all,

my project member has posted his timesheets to the wrong activitiy (R&D project). Now I want to move the entries to the correct activity without deleting and re-entering of each time record.

What is the best way to move timesheet entries from one PSP element to another?

Thank you.

BR

Dirk

entry.title: Re: Eclipse, Field for creation user is missing in source...

entry.title: Re: SAP SD Avalibality Check rule
entry.content: If you don't want to consider stock availability, then you need to switch ATP off. I wonder what business rationale you might have for creating a delivery to ship stock that is not available?

entry.title: Query related to SAP Note-2270261
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am seeking one clarification about SAP Note 2270261.

In note it is mentioned that-With SAP S/4HANA 1511 the target for links and references in reports CJI3N, CJI4N, CN41, CNS0 is going to the single maintenance transaction CJ20N (Project Builder).and n case of custom code for special maintenance functions only, customer should consider to enable the custom code for the Project Builder transactions

I am not getting exactly what will be changing by target for links and  references in reports means and for what exactly need to consider to enable CJ20N from custom code perspective.

Awaiting more clear understanding about this . thanks.

Regards,

Prajakta

entry.title: Re: Need help with printing of an https:// URL in backgro...
entry.content:
Perhaps this is an idea that could help: there are several generic HTML-to-PDF converters, either as open source libraries or as online services. You could retrieve the HTML file (without reading/parsing any tags etc.) send it through such a converter, get the PDF file and then send that to the printer.

You said you have a "middleware team", and most middlewares should be able to perform this task automatedly. For example, if you find an open source Java library for HTML-to-PDF conversion, you could plug this into your middleware and use it. For the SAP Business Connector (which is a quite powerful SAP middleware included in the standard SAP license) I have described a similar task in a blog: it gives step-by-step instructions on how one can use a certain open source library for Excel File conversion to convert the contents of an ABAP internal table to a Microsoft Excel file. Replace the Excel converter with a PDF converter, and you can probably re-use much of the technologies described in that blog. (SAP Business Connector can download an HTML page in binary format, pass it into the converter and then send the PDF back to the ABAP system -- or, with a bit of custom coding using the Java Printing API, send it directly to the printer.)

Here the link to that blog. If your middleware team is already using SAP Business Connector, this might be an easy way to achieve the requirement.

Using Java Functionality from your ABAP Programs

Similarly, the Business Connector could also send the HTML document to an online PDF-converter (instead of using a library/jar file).

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David

 

 I left a comment on your post two days ago, but since I haven't received a response yet, I'm reaching out to you again.

My name is Nguyet, I am a woman and part of an ethnic minority in northern Vietnam. Two weeks ago, I participated in the free attempt campaign that you introduced and received a free exam attempt. I took the exam and obtained a certificate in production management. I am very grateful for your help, and I am reaching out to you in the hope of receiving another free attempt so that I can further my learning and take other SAP certifications. 

I understand that it might be difficult for you to decide, but please consider it. This would be an incredibly valuable opportunity for me to change my career path in the near future.

Sincerely, thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to create a service type?
entry.content: Please don't challenge the question if you don't know the answer. It's alright, everyone here is for learning and seeking knowledge.

entry.title: Planning Sequence Execution Log (detail level)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

we want to get a detailed execution log for a specific planning sequence.

The information we need is planning sequence id, planning function id, success/failure, reason for failure, executor, execution date/time, applied filter details or parameters (e.g., corporation, profit center, etc.)

I could get some information from ST13, but couldn't get parts of  information like success/failure, reason for failure, parameters, etc. (there are id and execution date/time, executor information.)

Given the process in which the planning sequence is performed in RSPLAN,

meta data can be found from somewhere, but it's hard to find.

entry.title: Re: Modify the posting in F-54 when making an advance pay...
entry.content: Please check Ao90 configuration for the asset class the account determination is configured for GL to dpwn payment clearing and offset to asset when down paymet is made. please assess the rationale of this to down payment claering

entry.title: Re: Foreach confusion in SAC Advanced Formula
entry.content: Malya, Just look at the debug table. Each FA enters the loop 1 at time. Since you are replacing the FA by #X if the next FA had records with same PC combination as previous it will be replaced. So by the end of the loop only 4 records remain which will get assigned to 9370

entry.title: Re: how to convert numbers to dimension member info in sa...
entry.content:
Hi @N1kh1l,

I really appreciate your answer but I think I missed on some further details.

The value "202411" is actually saved in an another input field bcz I needed a condition to be fulfilled while using the dropdown so actually "202411" would be a derivation. 


                                                       

Here I am getting "202403" and its desc "Mar 24" from the below code: (OnInitialization)
var z=Table_6.getDataSource().getMembers ("Start_Date",{accessMode:MemberAccessMode.BookedValues});
InputField_9.setValue(z[i].id);
InputField_10.setValue(z[i].description);

I want the second value to work the same way i.e. 202404 as Apr 24.
But here I am using a different code on the first dropdown OnClick to get my requirement fulfilled which is as below:

I moulded your given code according to the need and used it on OnIntialization in order to get "Apr 24" in the second box while opening the story page. But seems like the code is not working fine. Below is the code used:

Seems that there is no error in the script but it is not working.

Your help would be appreciated.

Thanks so much

entry.title: Service layer Attachment2 error
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using the Service layer POST /Attachment2 endpoint to upload files using PHP curl but I'm having an error.  Below is my code

        $curl = curl_init();

        curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
        CURLOPT_URL => 'https://xx.xx.xx.xx:50000/b1s/v1/Attachments2',
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
                
        CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,  // Disable SSL certificate verification
        CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => false,  // Optionally, disable host verification
        
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
        CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => array('filename'=> new CURLFILE('path/to/testing.jpg')),
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
            'Cookie: '. $oData->getCookieStr()
        ),
        ));

        $response = curl_exec($curl);
        
        if (curl_errno($curl)) {
            dd('Error:' . curl_error($curl));
        } else {
            dd($response);
        }

        curl_close($curl);

and here are the results:

"error" : {

      "code" : 404,

      "message" : {

         "lang" : "en-us",

         "value" : "Create File Error: C:\\Windows\\TEMP\\ServiceLayer\\Attachments2/C:/Users/username/Desktop/testing.jpg"

      }

Has anyone experienced this? Thank you

entry.title: Re: solman 7.2 VAR and customer connection
entry.content:

Any update for below question. we have same requirement.

entry.title: Re: how to read field with namespace error Undeclared nam...
entry.content: The problem does not lie in your IFlow configuration, but in the SOAP request message that you are sending. You haven't declared the namespace prefix n0 there.

entry.title: Re: GUI ENQUE FM removed locks when GUI is closed
entry.content: The concept of SAP locks is to dequeue automatically if the session is closed (to say it simply). If you want to retain a lock, you'll have to do it full custom e.g. a batch which runs forever for a simple solution (but of course it's plain wrong to block a workprocess just for that; other solutions might be expensive though).

entry.title: Re: Modify the posting in F-54 when making an advance pay...
entry.content: Removing class from OAB and removing the account A090 it gaves the some error.

Hi,

I have checked the BFs and they are active as the 'Release' is much earlier than my version of the system (770), so I have not been able to solve the problem with what you propose.
Has anyone been able to fix it?

Thank you,

Sergio

entry.title: Copy Measures across hierarchies member using Advanced Formulas (Data Action)
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts, 

I'm new to Data Action in SAC Planning, and in these days I faced a requirement that can't figure it out.

The goal: Copy a the value of two measures (let's say VALUE and PERCENTAGE) whose are in the combination of specified dimensions.

Dimensions in scope are:

  • Account
  • Product
  • Plant
  • Entity
  • Owner
  • Flow

This is an example that I can use as a starting point, from which I want to copy VALUE and PERCENTAGE:

ACCOUNTPRODUCTPLANTENTITYOWNERFLOWVALUEPERCENTEAGE
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA#100,001,2
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA01.0100

And this is the result I'd like to obtain:

ACCOUNTPRODUCTPLANTENTITYOWNERFLOWVALUEPERCENTEAGE
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA#100,001,2
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA01.01100,001,2

So I basically need to copy measures from a Flow = # to other Flow "valorized" with != # in the combination (as shown in the table above).

I've tried many approaches, this is my last attempt (with less dimensions in the combo):

 

MEMBERSET [d/Account] = ("C010101", "C010102", "C010103", "C010104")

VARIABLEMEMBER #Account OF [d/Account]
VARIABLEMEMBER ##Flow OF [d/Flow
VARIABLEMEMBER #Owner OF [d/Owner]
VARIABLEMEMBER #Entity OF [d/Entity]

DATA([d/Flow] = #Flow) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Flow] = "#")

// In my attempts i tried also with FOREACH but i guess it's not necessary
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Flow] = #Flow, [d/Measures] = "VALUE") != NULL THEN // tried also with != 0 and 1-1

DATA([d/Flow ] = #Flow,
   [d/Entity] = #Entity,
   [d/Owner] = #Owner,
   [d/Measures] = "VALUE") = RESULTLOOKUP( [d/Flow] = "#",
 [d/Entity] = #Entity,
 [d/Owner] = #Owner,
 [d/Measures] = "VALUE")
ENDIF

IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Flow] = #Flow, [d/Measures] = "PERCENTAGE") != NULL THEN

DATA([d/Measures] = "PERCENTAGE") = RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Flow] = "#",
[d/Entity] = #Entity,
[d/Owner] = #Owner,
[d/Measures] = "PERCENTAGE")

ENDIF

 

 

I can write value but to all Flows, not only to the "scoped" ones.

Any guess? I'll appreciate any help.

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Modify the posting in F-54 when making an advance pay...
entry.content: q1. check the asset class of the asset that you enter in f-47. remove the ao90 for same only

entry.title: Practice Mode sim and Training Document Output
entry.content:
Hello Respected Members,

Can we publish a training document by only editing the Practice mode sim? My client wants the simulation in Practice mode and a related QRG. Based on my research, the training documents take the text from the Demo bubble. Does this mean that we need to edit the simulation in both Demo and Practice mode to publish a QRG. Your kind responses will be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: sending email to multiple person in workflow
entry.content: when I send email to multiple person, when one of them approve it is getting deleted from other inbox. how to get approval from all the users

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content:
@tskwin For most SAP scenarios, I think it's up to your personal preference for either SAML or OIDC. I just tend towards OIDC for two reasons:

  • There are a few SAP scenarios which require OIDC between IAS and Entra ID. Usually this is about principal propagation between MS and SAP "worlds", which works best when just exchanging OAuth/OIDC tokens. From that perspective, OIDC has an advantage over SAML because it covers something that SAML doesn't.
  • Afaik, but without deeper insights, my understanding is that Entra ID supports some features only with OIDC. @MartinRaepple Can you shed some more light on this?

entry.title: Hi I am new to sap build process automation. How to extract the data from an application using API.
entry.content: I am trying to extract the data using api for document manager application in sap build process automation. Can you please help me with step-by-step process on how to extract the data. Thanks in advance.

I already can create my DDLB and translate it. Problem is, that the list contains elements for all languages, not only the logon language

entry.title: Re: Modify the posting in F-54 when making an advance payment to a vendor related to a fixed asset
entry.content: In A090 for my asset class 433XXX I remove the accounts of Acquisition: down payments and Down-payments clearing account but it seems it needs an account because it gives an error in F-47

entry.title: Re: Unexpected OData Service Request with Incorrect Path...
entry.content:
@Dipnesh 

I think your approuter's xs-app.json should be like the one below. Please note that you have to put more restrictive route first in the routes array.

{
    "authenticationMethod": "route",
    "logout": {
        "logoutEndpoint": "/app-logout",
        "logoutPage": "/"
    },
    "routes": [
        {
            "source": "^/odata/(.*)$",
            "target": "/odata/$1",
            "destination": "srv-api",
            "csrfProtection": true,
            "authenticationType": "none"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/app/(.*)$",
            "target": "$1",
            "localDir": ".",
            "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/user-api(.*)",
            "target": "$1",
            "service": "sap-approuter-userapi"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/appconfig/",
            "localDir": ".",
            "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
        }
    ],
    "welcomeFile": "/project125"
}

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Services - Most Commonly used for SAP Commissions
entry.content: How to use BTP to integrate S4HANA with SAP Commissions(Running in Oracle database) work?

entry.title: Re: Cant access transaction in WEBGui for HTML via SAP Bu...
entry.content:
For webgui you also need to configure the following properties in the destination:https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/tunneled-access-to-sap-s-4hana-apps#sap-gui-for-html-properties

Also make sure the name of the destination is compliant:

  • The destination name cannot contain the underscore (_) character.

  • The destination name must be in lowercase letters.

Instead of manual integration, try configuring your system as a content provider: Content Providers - On-Premise Solutions | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Modify the posting in F-54 when making an advance pay...
entry.content: Make account determination against special gel indicator used in fbkp

entry.title: Convert Duration from ISO8601 Format to Double
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am using the "Find all time records" service in a production process design and want to have the effective Duration from the resulting Structure Array in another format than the ISO8601. Does anyone know how to convert the duration from ISO8601 to double into a Script Task?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David, 

Iam 37-years-old, Iam from Vietnam, this program has a special meaning for me. I have no any IT certificates, but almost my carrer untill now related to IT jobs also.

I belong to a group of individuals who do not have the financial means to purchase official courses and certification exams from the SAP Learning Hub. However, driven by a desire for self-improvement and the ambition to expand my career opportunities through the application of SAP.

I have successfully completed several courses on SAP via Udemy (using a shared company account). These courses covered modules such as SD, MM, EWM, and PP.

In my current job, I engage with SAP applications daily, and I am truly excited about the insights that these processes provide. They give me a clearer and more structured understanding of how to find solutions that optimize and enhance workflow efficiency for my business company.

I am now ready and eager to realize my dream of passing the exam to obtain one of SAP's prestigious certifications.

Please give me the opportunity to achieve this. I would greatly value this chance from you.

Thank you so much.

Hope to receive your response.

entry.title: /BIO/06* Tables Missing Error when adding additional Cost Center in Analysis for Office
entry.content:
Hi,

when i try to add additional planning columns in Analysis for Office, im getting the following Error Message:

I Checked the Note https://me.sap.com/notes/1139396

First i could not find the Tables in SE11 but after a while they appeared, which confused me since they should not be temporary, as stated in the note.

In the other systems (without any issues) there is no table like this in the se11, which confuses me, since they should be permanent?

Everytime im trying to execute adding a column a new table shows up.

This Error is only Occuring in the Quality System not in Production or Development.

A while ago a client copy was performed from prod -> Quality.

Im not sure if executing the two mentioned reports in the note will, help.

I hope anyone has some suggestions.

best regards

entry.title: Re: How to create BRF+ for SAP21 FI Customer Invoice in S4HANA Public cloud?
entry.content: leaving tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance and removing tags not related to FI Customer Invoice

entry.title: Condition Evaluation for Internal Communication
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

I have set up an internal communication process in my solution and want to understand how the conditions are evaluated. In my setup, there are two business objects: TestBO1 (Sending) and TestBO2 (Receiving). Here are the conditions:

Start Condition:
Return ((this.GetProcessContext().IsCreated() || this.GetProcessContext().IsUpdated() || this.GetProcessContext().IsChanged()) && this.Status == "3"); // 3 = In-process

Change Condition:
Return ((this.GetProcessContext().IsCreated() || this.GetProcessContext().IsUpdated() || this.GetProcessContext().IsChanged()) && this.Status == "3"); // 3 = In-process

Cancel Condition:
// 1 - Posted
// 2 - To be posted
// 4 - Resubmit
// 5 - Approved
Return (this.Status == "1" || this.Status == "2" || this.Status == "4" || this.Status == "5");

Whenever a record is created in TestBO1, it sends a message to TestBO2 as long as the status is "In-process". The same applies when a record is updated or changed. However, in the cancel condition, if the status changes to "Posted", "Approved", "To be posted", or "Resubmit", it will not send a message to TestBO2.

In TestBO2, there’s logic that creates a Physical Inventory Count Document and updates the status of the record in TestBO1 from "In-process" to "Posted". The issue is that after a record is created in TestBO1 and it gets processed in TestBO2, a duplicate Physical Inventory Count Document is generated the next morning at around 7 AM, even when no one is using ByD at that time. I suspect that the condition evaluation might be triggering a message to TestBO2 when the status is changed to "Posted", "Approved", "To be posted", or "Resubmit".

I noticed that the duplication happens every morning around 7 AM. Could this be causing memory dumps at the SAP ByDesign backend, resulting in retries every morning around 7 AM? Since 7 AM in Malaysia corresponds to 12 AM midnight or 1 AM in Germany, it might coincide with backend server refresh times.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Services - Most Commonly used for SAP Commissions
entry.content:
@S0024600552 

Kindly refer to the below integration package available as Standard for S/4 Integration with SAP Incentive Management.

https://hub.sap.com/package/SAPS4HANAIntegrationwithSAPSuccessFactorsIncentiveManagement/integrationflow

entry.title: SAP Grantor Management – What is new for the S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 release
entry.content:
In my first two blogs (Grantor management in S/4HANA  and Grantor Management - What is new since S/4HANA 2022 release) on SAP Grantor Management in S/4HANA, I covered all the features and functions introduced from the initial 2022 release up to the S/4HANA 2023 FPS1 release. In this post, I will discuss what’s new in the S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 release:

Virtual Data Model for grantor management

With this new virtual data model we provide straightforward and harmonized access to the data model for grantor management

Key benefits:

  1. Access to grantor-management data from embedded as well as external analytical tools for SAP S/4HANA
  2. Tool usage without the need to know the technical environment in which the data persists

 

Real-Time Reporting and Analytics for Grantor Management with Fiori Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and Drill-Downs

With these KPIs we provide an overview of the most important key performance indicators for grantor applications, agreements, and claims

Key benefits:

  1. Enable a unique user experience with a Web-based application and intuitive-to-consume UI
  2. Gain real-time insight into key information about grantor applications, agreements, and claims

For more information, see:

 My Applications Fiori App

My Agreements Fiori App 

My Claims Fiori App 

 

Business Warehouse data extraction and replication based on the virtual data model for grantor management

This development introduces new Business Warehouse extractors built on Core Data Services (CDS) views using the ABAP programming language for:

  • Grantor programs
  • Grantor applications
  • Grantor agreements
  • Grantor claims

For more information, see

Grantor Application - CDS view for data extraction 

Grantor Agreement - CDS view for data extraction 

Grantor Claim - CDS view for data extraction 

 

Stay tuned for more insights in the next post! Until then, thanks for reading, and feel free to share your thoughts or questions in the comments. See you next time!

Diego Gaudenzi, Grantor Management Product Owner

entry.title: Re: Condition Evaluation for Internal Communication
entry.content: I can understand if the duplication happens right after the internal communication process. However, the fact that duplication consistently happens every day at 7 AM, even when no one is using it at that time, is concerning.

entry.title: Re: Issue in filtering the data in SAP Build Apps preview
entry.content:
Hi Anjaly,

Were you able to resolve this issue, we are facing same issue while filtering Get Record Collection with object with properties, even when we try to hard code it.

 

 

Thanks 

Prasanna

entry.title: How to desactivate ( not delete) a storage location in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

How can we desactivate a storage location in SAP ECC without deleting it via OX09 ?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to add new fields to decision table DT_CHANNELin Billing document application
entry.content:
Dear SAP consultants,

We are working on S4HANA 2023 and we have activated the new output management for Billing documents.

We have a requirement to find a way to specify in BP master data  the channels through with the output will be distributed to Customers – PRINT, IDOC, MAIL.

We have managed to add the new fields in  decision table CHANNEL (DT_CHANNEL) in the Billing document application (OPD_V3_BILLING_DOCUMENT) and also to the rules.

Although it is now possible to register a rule in OPD based on the new fields, the output channel is not determined and it seems the reason is the values for this fields are not correctly read from the business partner master data.

Has someone done similar task? 

We would be glad to get some advise on the issue.

entry.title: Post Goods Issue ABAP RAP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am using ABAP Cloud Private Edition with SAPUI5 and ABAP RAP. I managed to create sales order via I_SalesOrderTP and then outbound delivery with I_OutboundDeliveryTP.

However, I am not able to post goods issue for this process, which I've been trying to do using I_MaterialDocumentTP:

This resulted in an error: Update control of movement type is incorrect (entry 601 X X)

What is the proper way to Post GI after creating outbound delivery? Item category has picking not required, so that would not be the problem here.

MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_MaterialDocumentTP

ENTITY MaterialDocument

CREATE FROM VALUE #( ( %cid = s_receipt_number

GoodsMovementCode = '06'

PostingDate = outbound_delivery-DeliveryDate

DocumentDate = outbound_delivery-DeliveryDate

%control-GoodsMovementCode = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-PostingDate = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-DocumentDate = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed ) )

 

ENTITY MaterialDocument

CREATE BY \_MaterialDocumentItem

FROM VALUE #( (

%cid_ref = s_receipt_number

%target = VALUE #( FOR item IN outbound_delivery_item (

%cid = item-OutboundDeliveryItem

plant = item-Plant

material = item-Material

GoodsMovementType = '601'

storagelocation = item-StorageLocation

QuantityInEntryUnit = item-ActualDeliveredQtyInOrderUnit

EntryUnit = item-OrderQuantityUnit

%control-plant = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-material = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-GoodsMovementType = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-storagelocation = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-QuantityInEntryUnit = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

%control-entryunit = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed

) ) ) )

MAPPED DATA(ls_mapped)

FAILED DATA(ls_failed)

REPORTED DATA(ls_reported).

 

Thank you for your time, Jakub

entry.title: Screen Painter Buttons Are Missing
entry.content:
Hello, I’ve started learning ABAP with the ABAP Developer Edition installed on my virtual machine, but I have an issue: My SAP GUI version appears to be 7.50, and I don’t see the buttons on the left side in the Screen Painter. How can I solve this problem? Do I need to upgrade my SAP GUI to 7.60 or something? As a p-user, how can I access these versions? I urgently need help. Thanks.

(Note: Utilities -> Setting-> Graphical Layout Editor is marked. There is no problem)
